title: キミが『全力』に輝き咲くのなら

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Here I GOOO! RAAAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's summer camp, and Winning Ticket is charging ahead from morning
to night.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wow! Trainer... You're geared up!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Boooom! Well, I'm burning with energy too! Like the sun! Today we
see who's got the most poweeer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Gah... Huff, puff... Y-you... okay?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! Our pacing... needs work!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But... Hahaha! I feel... so good right now!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: As soon as you went, "aaagh!," I got all, like, "raaaaagh!"

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Like, charged beyond charged! Past the max!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Synner-gee! Yeah, yeah... Sounds strong! I like it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Full power and full synergy. If we can combine the two, it might be
the perfect training for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: During our next session...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Joint training?! Whoooa, amazing! WOW! I'm... getting... puuumped!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yesterday, I burned like the sun! Today, I'll... uhhh... burn like a super
suuun!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
It's so hot, I'm sweating already... To be honest, I just wanna take it
easy, ya know?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Same here... Well, it's just one day, right? Let's get it over with.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Long-distance swimming? Sure, I'm a pretty good swimmer. How does,
say, about 3,000 meters sound?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I know! We'll swim to that little island over there and back! Some
front crawl! Butterfly! Finish with a tail propeller!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! That island's, like, 5,000 meters from here... Hey, wait! Hold
on!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Geez! I won't be left behind! I told you, I'm good at swimming!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
The tire pull, huh? No problem. Power's my specialty. I can even
handle two of Tracen's super heavyweight tires.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huff, wheeze. I brought us some super heavyweight tires.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Nice, thanks—hey, wait! You brought four each?! I was just telling you
two is my limit!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Right! Exactly why I gotta pull four! Anyway, off I gooooo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hrnnngh! HEEEAVE!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Tch, four is no joke! Not bad. But I'm not gonna lose in a battle of
strength!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: She really got one over on us.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: We wound up doing some intense training, huh. But...

text_block_list.name: The Two
text_block_list.text: Our times are getting better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While weary from the exhausting training, the two Umamusume are
satisfied to see their hidden potential unleashed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However, the biggest gainer from today's practice is...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: T-T-T-T-Traineeer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Look! My time! I'm getting WAAAY faster!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oooh, so this was that synner-gee thing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It's pretty amazing! Like, wow! And you're amazing too, Trainer!
Super, super special!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thanks for a great day of training!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it was nice! Tiring... but it felt really great!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right! Time to hit the sack and snooooze till tomorrow—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaait! I TOTALLY FOR-GOT!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It's today! It's happening right now... The festival!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Barely made it! Festivals mean it's time to have fun, fun, fun, and more
fun! Right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We'll conquer all the yummy food stalls! Join the festival dance! And,
and...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ah! Look, Trainer! In the sky!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh... Wooooow! Fireworks! All booming and sparklyyy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: They're beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... Those fireworks were something!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey, you know what... The fireworks went full power too. I felt it.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
"I'm the most dazzling!" "No, me!" I could see them bursting in a bright
battle with each other!
choice_data_list: Just like you and the others today.
Just like you and the others today.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Hey, maybe you're right!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
She's running! I'm running! We're all running! An explosion of
"I'm-not-gonna-lose" synner-gee for ya!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But I... I'm going to be the biggest, brightest explosion of them all!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: In training, in races, and, most of all, in the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The strongest Umamusume pitting their fullest power against each
other! No matter how many other racers rise up from that synner-gee...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'll show everyone how my full power can surpass them all... And we'll
win the Derby together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket's vow is so powerful, it feels like her dreams can
propel her far off into the distance, past even the horizon.
